tool_args.label: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: B82 Southern Brooklyn Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed B82 Select Bus Service along Southern Brooklyn corridor, identified in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study
Proposed B82 SBS route from Flatlands Ave/E 80th-82nd St to Cropsey/Bay 37 St, replacing B82 Limited
Existing B82 local bus service, to serve existing route to Coney Island after SBS launch

evidence_refs.source_quote: B82 SBS to end at Cropsey/Bay 37 St, Local to serve existing to Coney Island

payload.description: Existing B82 Limited bus service along Southern Brooklyn corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: Serves 32,000 daily riders on B82 Limited and Local

payload.description: Existing B6 bus route serving Canarsie-Rockaway Pkwy area; proposed re-routing via Glenwood Rd

payload.street: Kings Highway, Flatlands Avenue, Pennsylvania Avenue
payload.description: B82 corridor identified as a potential SBS candidate in 2009, spanning from Flatlands Ave to Kings Hwy across Southern Brooklyn

payload.claim_text: SBS has brought 10-30% faster bus speeds, about 10% increase in ridership, more reliable service, customer satisfaction of 95%, safer streets / reduction in crashes
Over 50% of trip spent delayed, crawling, or at bus stop. Customers wait in long lines to pay on board the bus. Bus stops lack amenities, not ADA accessible.

tool_args.label: B82 Canarsie-Rockaway Pkwy westbound loop issues

payload.claim_text: Westbound loop confusing and slow for bus customers. Can take up to 10 minutes to return to Flatlands Ave. Adds unnecessary traffic on local streets and at major intersections.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.description: For presentation to NYCHA Breukelen Houses Tenants Association

payload.location_text: Glenwood Rd (Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St)
payload.description: Bus lane replaces parking lane along north curb (E 98 St to E 103 St). Eastbound open to all traffic, Westbound buses only.

normalized_location.raw_text: Glenwood Rd (Rockaway Pkwy to E 103 St)

payload.location_text: Flatlands Ave (E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave)
payload.description: Proposed Bus Lanes on Flatlands Ave: Westbound bus lane from Pennsylvania Ave to E 105 St, Eastbound bus lane from E 103 St to Louisiana Ave

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatlands Ave (E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave)

tool_args.label: B82 Proposed Re-route Westbound via Glenwood Rd

payload.description: Proposed re-routing westbound buses via Glenwood Rd. Streamlines routing, removes unnecessary distance and turns. More customer-friendly routing by matching both directions. Reduces bus traffic on local streets and at major intersections.

tool_args.label: B6 Proposed Re-route via Glenwood Rd

payload.description: Faster, more direct routing to Rockaway Pkwy Station via Glenwood Rd. Relocates B6 to Glenwood Rd, E 103 St Stop to E 102 St providing more direct connections to Breukelen Houses.

tool_args.label: B82 Proposed Re-route via Avenue K connector

payload.description: Proposed re-route connects Kings Hwy to Flatlands Ave via Ave K instead of existing Flatbush Ave

payload.location_text: Flatlands Ave, E 105 St, Pennsylvania Ave
payload.description: Proposed B82 SBS and Local Stops along the B82 SBS route. Key stops at Flatlands Ave and E 80th/82nd St, Flatlands Ave and Remsen Ave, E 105 St and Louisiana Ave, E 105 St and Vandalia Ave, Pennsylvania Ave and Schroeders Ave, Pennsylvania Ave and Seaview Ave.

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatlands Ave, E 105 St, Pennsylvania Ave

tool_args.label: B82 connects to D N F B Q L subway lines

payload.claim_text: Connects to D N F B Q L subway lines and 21 bus routes, including B44 Nostrand SBS and B46 Utica SBS. Serves areas far from the subway.

tool_args.label: B82 SBS to end at Cropsey/Bay 37 St

payload.claim_text: B82 SBS to end at Cropsey/Bay 37 St, Local to serve existing to Coney Island
